sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65683" key="mequtro/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεθυ-τρόφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n65683.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">producing wine</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡμερίς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:183:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">183.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
